ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "src_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "src_type" TEXT /* Type of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast */,
  "forecast_model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the forecast_models table */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_forecast_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
